title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Taj SATS - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Taj SATS - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Taj SATS are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Taj SATS:
Taj SATS is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj SATS!
